_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: bun generic
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
A generic Bun egg.

Bun v1.3 — all-in-one JavaScript runtime, bundler, and package manager. TypeScript-native, extremely fast.

This will clone a git repo. Defaults to master branch.
Installs dependencies via bun install on startup.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ ! -z ${BUN_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/bun add ${BUN_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then /usr/local/bin/bun install; fi; /usr/local/bin/bun run /home/container/{{MAIN_FILE}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Bun Generic Installation Script
# by Aetherix-ops
#
apt update && apt install -y git curl jq file unzip
mkdir -p /mnt/server && cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "user upload mode."; exit 0
fi

[[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]] && GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git

[ -z "${USERNAME}" ] || GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"

if [ ! "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} /mnt/server
    [ ! -z "${BRANCH}" ] && git checkout ${BRANCH}
fi

[ -f /mnt/server/package.json ] && /usr/local/bin/bun install
echo "install complete"

variables.name: Main File
variables.description: Main file to run. Default is index.ts

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest git on startup. 1 = enabled.

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description: Git repo to clone. Example: https://github.com/user/repo

variables.name: Bun Packages
variables.description: Extra bun packages to install. Space separated.

variables.name: User Upload
variables.description: Set to 1 if uploading your own files.
